question: List the Collection Name that document owned by 'Ransom ' belong to .
sql: SELECT DISTINCT Collections.Collection_Name FROM Documents_in_Collections JOIN Collections ON Documents_in_Collections.Collection_ID = Collections.Collection_ID WHERE Documents_in_Collections.Document_Object_ID IN (SELECT Document_Object_ID FROM Document_Objects WHERE Owner = 'Ransom')
